flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at County College of Morris rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at County College of Morris fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at County College of Morris are 16% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($50.2k vs $43.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at County College of Morris fell 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $9.0k).
